name: Chocolate Mint Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy gauge saucepan, combine 1 1/4 cups heavy cream, milk, sugar and 1 cup of mint chocolate chips. Cook over low heat, stirring with a wire whisk, until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat.
2. In a medium bowl, beat egg yolks and salt until thick. Gradually add the chocolate mixture, beating until well blended. Chill for 30 minutes.
3. In a small heavy gauge saucepan, combine the remaining 1/2 cup of chips and 1/4 cup of heavy cream. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. Pour the chilled chocolate/egg mixture into an electric ice cream freezer and churn until thick, about 25 minutes. Pour in the reserved chocolate mixture; churn for 10 seconds more.
5. Turn off the machine and cover. Store in the freezer until ready to serve.
